content: [{'text': 'The robot is moving east along the middle corridor. The red dot appears to be touching the black wall above — I need to be careful. The robot is at the boundary of the black wall. Let me continue moving east along the corridor toward the right side where I can find a passage north to the upper corridor.\n\nThe front is clear, so let me continue east.', 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01KeMggKg5LtCMGHhsHWBhcC', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'distance_meters': 1.0}, 'name': 'move_forward', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
